channel.title: Classifications on QA & University Performance Department
channel.description: Recent content in Classifications on QA & University Performance Department

item.title: Arab Rankings
item.description:
Tracked Arab Rankings

QS Arab Region University Rankings

A regional edition of the QS ranking, focused on universities in Arab countries; criteria include academic reputation, employer reputation, faculty-to-student ratio, research, and internationalization.

4ICU Arab Region

A web-based ranking produced by 4ICU that measures the web presence and online impact of Arab universities.

Association of Arab Universities Ranking

A ranking issued by the Association of Arab Universities measuring the academic, research and social performance of member institutions.

item.title: International Rankings
item.description:
Monitored International Rankings

Times Higher Education World University Ranking

The ranking evaluates the performance of research universities based on their core missions and includes the following criteria:

  • Teaching and the learning environment: Includes academic reputation and the student-to-staff ratio.
  • Research environment: Measures research volume, research income, and research reputation.
  • Research quality: Focuses on citation impact, research strength, excellence, and global influence.
  • International outlook: Measures the proportion of international students, staff, and cross-border collaborative research.
  • Industry and innovation: Measures the amount of income the university generates from the industry sector and patents.

University Impact Ranking

item.title: Iraqi Ranking of Universities (IRU)
item.description:
Iraqi Ranking of Universities (IRU)

The Iraqi Ranking of Universities (IRU) is a national ranking produced by the Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research in cooperation with the Research and Development Directorate. It evaluates Iraqi universities against a unified set of indicators covering teaching quality, research, and community service.

  • 2025 Ranking

Ranking Pillars

  • Teaching and Learning: programme quality, faculty-to-student ratio, educational infrastructure
  • Scientific Research: publications in international databases, citations, patents
  • Community Service: community engagement, consultations, training
  • Internationalization: cooperation agreements, international students, academic exchange
  • Resources and Administration: administrative efficiency, human and financial resources
  • Governance and Transparency: policies, procedures, reporting

Note: The ranking is released periodically. The Performance Evaluation Division in the department collects and submits the required data to the national ranking committee.
